violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. -First two meat slicing machines were operated by employees without gloves. Employees were observed handling ready-to-eat food without gloves.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Walk-in Cooler used to store cheese has unsealed wood at entryway and pallets are being used for shelving.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Small walk-in freezer has pealing paint on the ceiling and the floor is showing exposed, unsealed wood.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. ServSafe associate left in April 2025.
Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Stored meat and cheese did not have a date on plastic wrap covering.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Shelving in walk in cooler was constructed of unsealed wood.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Outside Walk in freezer had drainage hose in a bucket.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable.

General premises. — --Opening to outside or portion of building that is not part of the food establishment, was not protected against the entry of insects and rodents. Approx. 2 inch gap in doorway to outside.
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
